news.title:
Tata Motors PV plans to reduce Sanand facility production by 50%.
Informist Media reported the production cut by Tata Motors PV.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Motors' February PV sales rose to 63,331 units, up from 46,811 YoY.
Sales missed analyst estimates of 65,800 units despite YoY growth.
news.summary:

news.title: Tata Motors plans to hike car prices due to rising commodity costs.

news.title:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles expects better Q4 margins via Sierra launch, price hikes, and lower VME.
JLR faces debt issues, with EBIT margin forecast lowered due to forex losses and VME pressures.
news.summary:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles expects better Q4 margins via Sierra launch, price hikes, and lower VME.
JLR faces debt issues, with EBIT margin forecast lowered due to forex losses and VME pressures.

news.title:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles plans INR 4,200-4,300 crore investment this year, aiming for Q4 growth of 13%-14%.
The company projects 40% growth ahead of FY'26, with industry growth estimated at 8%-9%.
news.summary:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles plans INR 4,200-4,300 crore investment this year, aiming for Q4 growth of 13%-14%.
The company projects 40% growth ahead of FY'26, with industry growth estimated at 8%-9%.

news.title:
JLR projects FY'26 EBIT above 0%, FCF at negative GBP2.2B-2.5B.
Capex guidance at GBP3.6B-3.7B; VME to hit 7.7% before declining.
news.summary:
JLR projects FY'26 EBIT above 0%, FCF at negative GBP2.2B-2.5B.
Capex guidance at GBP3.6B-3.7B; VME to hit 7.7% before declining.

news.title:
Tata Motors CFO confirms full capacity operations at Solihull and Nitra plants.
This reflects robust production levels and operational efficiency for the company.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Motors expects strong Q4 performance driven by JLR volume recovery.
The company plans a £18B investment over five years, targeting growth by FY27.
news.summary:
Tata Motors expects strong Q4 performance driven by JLR volume recovery.
The company plans a £18B investment over five years, targeting growth by FY27.

news.title:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd presented Q3 FY26 financial results, showing robust performance with 22% YoY growth and record 171K unit sales.
Highlights include 70K Sierra bookings on Day 1, new Punch facelift, and EV sales surpassing 250K units, reaffirming EV leadership.
news.summary:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd presented Q3 FY26 financial results, showing robust performance with 22% YoY growth and record 171K unit sales.
Highlights include 70K Sierra bookings on Day 1, new Punch facelift, and EV sales surpassing 250K units, reaffirming EV leadership.

news.title: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Q3 revenue drops to ₹701B from ₹945B YoY.
news.summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Q3 revenue drops to ₹701B from ₹945B YoY.

news.title:
Tata Motors' Q3 FY26 revenue fell 25.8% to ₹70,108 Cr, hit by JLR cyber incident.
JLR revenue dropped 39.4%, while domestic PV revenue rose 24%; Q4 recovery expected.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' Q3 FY26 revenue fell 25.8% to ₹70,108 Cr, hit by JLR cyber incident.
JLR revenue dropped 39.4%, while domestic PV revenue rose 24%; Q4 recovery expected.

Sales exceeded estimates of 62,020 units, showcasing strong growth.

news.title:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles reduced stake in TP Paarthav Ltd to 12.9% from 26%.
TP Paarthav Ltd ceased being an associate company from Jan 8, 2026, post NCLT approval.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Motors' JLR Q3 FY26 sales fell due to a cyber incident, with wholesales down 43.3% to 59,200 units.
Retail sales dropped 25.1% to 79,600 units, impacted by production stoppages and legacy Jaguar model wind-down.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' JLR Q3 FY26 sales fell due to a cyber incident, with wholesales down 43.3% to 59,200 units.
Retail sales dropped 25.1% to 79,600 units, impacted by production stoppages and legacy Jaguar model wind-down.

news.title:

Sales missed estimates of 51,667 units despite YoY growth.
